opening_thought: Stars through glass. Brass and silence. The word STILL is written everywhere up here.

thoughts.lesson_4_observatory: Still. The last lesson. The door will know when you carry it home.
thoughts.all_lessons_learned: Four lessons. Four worlds. The bedroom door waits for all of them.
thoughts.observatory_telescope_musings: Every star is a pin in a map you forgot you made.
thoughts.observatory_chart_musings: The chart highlights one word among the constellations: STILL.

observatory_clue_found.title: Star Chart Clue
observatory_clue_found.body: One word circled on the chart: STILL.

lesson_4_observatory.title: Lesson — Still
lesson_4_observatory.body: The brass chest opened to STILL. The bedroom door can hear you now.

observatory_telescope.title: Telescope
observatory_telescope.body: Brass tube aimed at a sky that shouldn't exist indoors. The lens is clean as a held breath.

observatory_chart.title: Star Chart
observatory_chart.body: Constellations traced in gold ink. One word circled again and again: STILL.

observatory_chest.title: Brass Chest
observatory_chest.body: The final lock in the four worlds. It wants the word the stars keep repeating.

ending.title: Observatory
ending.body: The dome turns. You have what you came for.
